pokemon:drednaw.name: Drednaw
pokemon:drednaw.summary: This Pokémon rapidly extends its retractable neck to sink its sharp fangs into distant enemies and take them down.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This Pokémon rapidly extends its retractable neck to sink its sharp fangs into distant enemies and take them down.
With jaws that can shear through steel rods, this highly aggressive Pokémon chomps down on its unfortunate prey.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This Pokémon rapidly extends its retractable neck to sink its sharp fangs into distant enemies and take them down.

pokemon:chewtle.name: Chewtle
pokemon:chewtle.summary: It starts off battles by attacking with its rock-hard horn, but as soon as the opponent flinches, this Pokémon bites down and never lets go.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It starts off battles by attacking with its rock-hard horn, but as soon as the opponent flinches, this Pokémon bites down and never lets go.
Apparently the itch of its teething impels it to snap its jaws at anything in front of it.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It starts off battles by attacking with its rock-hard horn, but as soon as the opponent flinches, this Pokémon bites down and never lets go.
